problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: Combining DNA computing for massively parallel search with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
